vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues due to high avionics density
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling measures around avionics bay

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if wing loads exceed design limits
risk.mit: Conduct thorough load testing and reinforce spar sockets if necessary

risk.desc: Camera window may obstruct ground crew visibility
risk.mit: Position camera window to avoid blocking critical areas

physics_paths.path: Wing spar loads -> Spar socket -> Fuselage spine -> Landing gear mounts
Avionics heat -> Heat sink fins -> Ambient air
Belly camera window -> Camera module -> Ground crew access

integration_opportunities.name: avionics_bay
integration_opportunities.description: Integrate modular avionics components with easy access for maintenance.

integration_opportunities.name: camera_window
integration_opportunities.description: Ensure unobstructed view for belly-mounted camera.

integration_opportunities.name: spar_socket
integration_opportunities.description: Optimize socket design for efficient transfer of wing loads.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and axis rings

verification_focus.name: mass_check
verification_focus.description: Verify mass estimation against design budget.

verification_focus.name: structural_integrity
verification_focus.description: Test structural integrity under simulated flight loads.

generated_parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

requirements: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin
Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

verify.value: All required fields present.
verify.rule: Ensure all necessary elements are included.
Ensure mass estimate aligns with design constraints.

verify.value: All features traceable to original design intent.
verify.rule: Ensure each part and operation can be linked back to initial requirements.

verify.value: Interfaces defined with clear connection types and DOFs.
verify.rule: Ensure interfaces are reciprocal and clearly defined.

verify.value: Some joints lack explicit locking or preload evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints should have visible locking or preload mechanisms.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to loose tolerances on snap-fit interfaces.
risk.mit: Specify tighter tolerances or add mechanical locks to snap-fit interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient heat dissipation from sun exposure into spar socket.
risk.mit: Increase thermal conductivity of materials or add cooling fins.

risk.desc: Possibility of nacelle loads not being adequately transferred into wing structure.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and reinforce wing spar if necessary.

risk.desc: Landing gear mount may not provide sufficient clearance for maintenance access.
risk.mit: Review clearance and adjust landing gear mount dimensions if needed.

risk.desc: Access cover design might limit serviceability and ease of component replacement.
risk.mit: Optimize access cover layout to improve service access.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface connections.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough pre-assembly checks and provide clear assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress on motor and ESC due to inadequate cooling.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling measures if necessary based on thermal testing results.

risk.desc: Complexity in manufacturing may increase production time and costs.
risk.mit: Optimize manufacturing processes and consider outsourcing complex parts.

risk.desc: Potential for misinterpretation of assembly order hints leading to incorrect assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Clarify assembly order hints and provide visual aids for assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance between moving parts causing jamming.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance values based on prototype testing feedback.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

physics_paths.path: Wing spar -> Bearing seat -> Motor mount
Cooling air intake -> Motor cooling duct -> Exhaust port
Motor heat -> Heat sink -> Cooling air exhaust
Servo -> Worm gear -> Tilt axis -> Nacelle rotation
Air pressure -> Rotor blades -> Nacelle structure -> Fuselage
ESC power -> Motor wiring -> Servo control cable

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Power - Slide-in li-ion battery pack bay with CG adjustment, BMS and connector access

physics_paths.description: Li-ion battery pack powers the electrical distribution panel via connector access.
Heat from the battery pack is dissipated through a ventilation channel to a cooling fan.
Human service access to Battery Management System (BMS) via a dedicated access panel.

integration_opportunities.description: Integration of a 6S 8000mAh Li-ion battery pack with snap-fit retention.
Connection to the electrical distribution panel for power delivery.
Cooling system integration for thermal management.

verification_focus.description: Ensure the subsystem does not exceed 2500g.
Verify the battery pack is securely retained using Velcro and straps.
Confirm all electrical connections are properly mated and accessible.
